rationale: Keep: the citing note says Study 3 reanalyzes eye-tracking conjoint data from 70 participants completing 20 laptop choices, which closely matches the cited paper’s laptop eye-tracking study design (n=70, 20 tasks). This is unlikely to be an incidental mention and instead suggests substantive use of the cited paper’s dataset/process findings; the DOI match (10.1509/jmr.13.0467) confirms the linkage.
